channel.title: admin on JD the ocean geochemist
channel.description: Recent content in admin on JD the ocean geochemist

item.description: I’m a ocean geochemist and I study trace elements and this isotopes (TEIs) in the ocean and their applications in understanding present and past ocean changes. I’m especially interested in the cycling of TEIs across the sediment-water interface, and its effect on the budgets of TEIs in the modern ocean and the use of TEIs as paleoclimate proxies. Right now my research focuses on Rare Earth Elements (Nd), redox senstive metals (U and Mo), transition metals (Fe, Cu, Ni, Zn) and their isotopes.
